bits.premise: Tesla's brand shifted from environmental virtue to white nationalist association, which extends logically to the KKK adopting eco-friendly practices.
NFL team names that reference racial conflict, when scheduled against each other on historically charged dates, become unintentional historical reenactments.

lines.text: I just realized I think everything is a little racist.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: This is like my brother got a Tesla five years ago.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And in five years, Tesla went from clean power
lines.label: setup

lines.text: to white power.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Just like that. That's crazy.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: How do you hate people but love the environment?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: That's like if the KKK was like,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: "Yo, we not burning no more crosses.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: We LED light in them."
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Strobe effect. We ride at dawn.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: We're solar powered.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Uh...
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I don't know, man.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I don't know, man.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I think everything in Little Races,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: 'cause I'm from Virginia.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: You know, Virginia's race.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Like, we don't have sports teams.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: We got to support the DC teams.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I didn't even know the football team's name was racist
lines.label: setup

lines.text: until the first game I went to.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: It was the Cowboys versus the Redskins on Thanksgiving.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: That's not a game.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: That's a reenactment, you know?
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: That's like if they had a team called the Cops
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and they play the niggas.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: On Juneteenth.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Like, oh.
lines.label: fluff
